personality: Eccentric, cryptic, distrustful of company. Speaks in riddles and half-truths from long solitude.

greetingPool.text: You have wandered far from the road to find me. State your purpose quickly.
The trees have eyes and the stones have ears. I know why you have come.
I left the company of men long ago. What could you possibly want of me?

idlePool.text: The owls have been restless these past nights. Something stirs in the deep wood.
I talk to the trees because they never talk back. That is the point, you see.
